title: Singalila National Park
tagline: Singalila National Park — wildlife reserve of West Bengal

overview.short: Singalila National Park is a national park of India located on the Singalila Ridge at an elevation of more than 2,300 metres above sea level, in the Darjeeling district of West Ben
overview.description: Singalila National Park is a national park of India located on the Singalila Ridge at an elevation of more than 2,300 metres above sea level, in the Darjeeling district of West Bengal. It is well known for the trekking route to Sandakphu that runs through it.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Rimbick
topPlaces.description: Rimbick is a village in the Darjeeling Pulbazar CD block in the Darjeeling Sadar subdivision of the Darjeeling district in West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Okhrey
topPlaces.description: Okhrey is a village situated in West Sikkim district, India.

topPlaces.name: Lodhoma
topPlaces.description: Lodhoma is a village and gram panchayat in the Darjeeling Pulbazar CD block in the Darjeeling Sadar subdivision of the Darjeeling district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Sandakphu
topPlaces.description: Sandakphu or Sandakpur at 3,636 m (11,929 ft) is a mountain peak in the Singalila Ridge on the border between India and Nepal. It is the highest point of the ridge and of the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Tumling
topPlaces.description: Tumling is a small hamlet in Jogmai VDC, Ilam District of Nepal. A tourist attraction in Eastern Himalayas at an altitude of 2970m(10,000 ft), its population is composed mostly of Gurung families, with the total population being a mere 15 in number.

topPlaces.name: Ambotey
topPlaces.description: Ambotey is a village between Daramdin and Sombaria in Soreng district, Sikkim, India. Several schools are located in or near Ambotey.

topPlaces.name: Tonglu, West Bengal
topPlaces.description: Tonglu (3036 m above mean sea level) is one of the higher peaks of the Singalila Ridge and a small settlement inside the Singalila National Park in the Darjeeling subdivision, Darjeeling district in the state of West Bengal in India near the India - Nepal border. It is a roadside halt along the trekking route from Manebhanjan to Sandakphu.

items.note: Rimbick is a village in the Darjeeling Pulbazar CD block in the Darjeeling Sadar subdivision of the Darjeeling district in West Bengal, India.
Okhrey is a village situated in West Sikkim district, India.
Lodhoma is a village and gram panchayat in the Darjeeling Pulbazar CD block in the Darjeeling Sadar subdivision of the Darjeeling district in the state of West Bengal, India.

Sandakphu or Sandakpur at 3,636 m (11,929 ft) is a mountain peak in the Singalila Ridge on the border between India and Nepal. It is the highest point of the ridge and of the state of West Bengal, India.

Tumling is a small hamlet in Jogmai VDC, Ilam District of Nepal. A tourist attraction in Eastern Himalayas at an altitude of 2970m(10,000 ft), its population is composed mostly of Gurung families, with the total population being a mere 15 in number.
Ambotey is a village between Daramdin and Sombaria in Soreng district, Sikkim, India. Several schools are located in or near Ambotey.

Tonglu (3036 m above mean sea level) is one of the higher peaks of the Singalila Ridge and a small settlement inside the Singalila National Park in the Darjeeling subdivision, Darjeeling district in the state of West Bengal in India near the India - Nepal border. It is a roadside halt along the trekking route from Manebhanjan to Sandakphu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Singalila National Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Singalila National Park is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Singalila National Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pakyong Airport, Gangtok (53 km) and the nearest railway station is Siliguri Junction (57 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Singalila National Park?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Singalila National Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Singalila National Park?
faq.a: Stays in Singalila National Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Singalila National Park?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rimbick, Okhrey, Lodhoma, Sandakphu, Tumling.
